# RentWorksPlus
> Cloud-based car rental management platform by Bluebird Auto Rental Systems

RentWorksPlus is a multi-tenant, cloud-based car rental management platform with 26 integrated modules. It covers the full rental lifecycle from reservations through check-out, including fleet management, multi-gateway payment processing, claims management, and customer relationship management.

## Core Capabilities
- Reservations: Full reservation lifecycle with conflict detection and availability tracking
- Fleet Management: ACRISS classification, service history, and real-time vehicle availability
- Payment Processing: Multi-gateway support — Adyen, Worldpay, TriPOS, CenPOS
- Vehicle Inspection: Photo-based digital inspection covering 60+ vehicle zones
- Claims Management: End-to-end claims with multi-vehicle tracking and repair orders
- Form Builder: Visual drag-and-drop document builder with conditional logic
- Analytics Dashboard: 15+ real-time KPIs for fleet, revenue, and operations
- Customer Profiles: 360-degree customer management with OCR license scanning
- Loyalty Programs: Configurable tiers, points, and rewards

## Key Facts
- 26 integrated feature modules
- Multi-tenant architecture with role-based access control
- Payment gateways: Adyen, Worldpay, TriPOS, CenPOS
- 60+ vehicle inspection zones with photo documentation
- 15+ dashboard KPIs for real-time analytics
- Multi-location enterprise configuration
- Built-in interactive training and onboarding system
